nasb.text: But they cried out all together, saying, “Away with this man, and release for us Barabbas!”

esv.text: But they all cried out together, “Away with this man, and release to us Barabbas”—

cnv.text: 眾人齊聲喊叫：“除掉這個人，給我們釋放巴拉巴！”

ccb.text: 这时，众人齐声呼喊：“杀掉祂！释放巴拉巴！”

csbs.text: 他们却一齐喊叫说：“除掉这个人！给我们释放巴拉巴！”
